'''Dorsk 83''' was a [[Khommite/Legends|Khommite]] from [[Khomm/Legends|Khomm]]. He was created to serve in the cloning facility where his forebears had worked, shortly before [[Dorsk 82]] departed to train in the ways of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. It was his predecessor's hope that Dorsk 83 would also eventually become a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] in the [[New Jedi Order]], like he and [[Dorsk 81]] had.<ref name="TEGtAS">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>
